<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
  - Java basics practice project with source code in src/main/java

- [x] Scaffold the Project
  - Created Maven-style directory structure (src/main/java, src/test/java)
  - Added .vscode/settings.json for Java configuration
  - Created sample HelloWorld.java template

- [ ] Customize the Project
  - Users can add their practice exercises

- [x] Install Required Extensions
  - Recommended: Extension Pack for Java (microsoft.vscode-java-pack)

- [ ] Compile the Project
  - Run: javac src/main/java/HelloWorld.java

- [ ] Create and Run Task
  - User can use VS Code tasks to compile and run

- [ ] Launch the Project
  - Ready to use for Java practice

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
  - README.md created with setup instructions
  - copilot-instructions.md updated
